column40:
Beach Blanket Sand Proof, Waterproof, Extra Large Beach Blanket, Oversized & Compact, Quick Drying, Lightweight & Durable with 4 Corner Pockets

  • 100% Nylon
  • ✔ LARGE AND COMPACT-7'x7'(210cmX210cm) will comfortably fit 1-3 adults, making it one of the most practical beach essentials. Come with 6 metal stakes in a pouch for 4 anchor loops so you will have 2 spare ones just in case.
  • ✔ SIMPLE DESIGN & DOUBLE ANCHORED-WEKAPO blanket is designed as simple as possible so it has eliminated 5 sticking out sand pockets and added 4 corner pockets that can be used for storage or sand anchor. If it's windy day, it can be nailed down on beach by metal stakes coming with our blanket.
  • ✔ SAND PROOF AND WATER RESISTANT-This beautifully colored blanket is made of durable ripstop nylon. Just shake the blanket and it easily gets rid of all the sand once. Not only is this wonderful fabric breathable and light-weight, but watch as water beads up and rolls off. The little water that may stay behind will dry VERY FAST.
  • ✔ SUPERIOR QUALITY- Triple stitched for maximum strength and durability - a true beach must-have. All pieces of this blanket are made with lasting use in mind.
  • ✔ MULTIFUNCTIONAL – Use it as a Picnic Blanket, for relaxing during vacation and enjoying a sand-free zone while the kids play with beach toys, hiking/camping or simply for hanging out with friends or family in a garden/backyard – a truly multifunctional beach accessories!

column40:
About This Item

  • Full mask fin snorkel set: zeeporte long snorkel set with adjustable fins, two window tempered glass lens mask, dry top silicone snorkel, travel gear bag, it's the ultimate travel companion and is suitable for snorkeling, swimming, body surfing, boogie boards and much more.
  • Panoramic view snorkel dive mask: made of a four-window design for a panoramic view with tempered glass lens and hypoallergenic silicone skirt, zeeporte snorkel mask can withstand underwater pressure while diving and snorkeling, ultimate comfort. the diving mask's skirt is designed with soft and flexible silicone and the food-grade silicone mouthpiece is safe creates a watertight seal with the any driver's face and attached to your mouth perfectly without any peculiar smell.
  • Unobstructed breathing dry top snorkel: a high-quality snorkel with a dry-top valve that seals the breathing tube when submerged. dry top snorkel is designed to keep water from entering the breathing tube, ergonomic silicone mouthpiece is comfortable and durable. Lower purge valve allows water to be quickly expelled, so you can enjoy easy and unobstructed breathing while diving underwater.
  • Flexible adjustable trek fins: longer, lightweight and the responsive blade assure a kick that is fluid, effortless yet at the same time quite powerful. trek fins with open-heel style and adjustable strap, the foot pocket and the strap are made of long-lasting rubber that ensures a comfortable fit. The zeeporte blade delivers excellent thrust with a modest kicking effort, perfect for your snorkeling or diving adventure.
  • All-in-one packing gear bag: 3 essential items in one quick-dry mesh bag. re-usable zip-up bag with a shoulder strap, perfect for travel and recreational use. amazing low package for all four items and good for traveling.

column95:
Culinary oasis description:

Discover the essence of Culebra through a gourmet experience that celebrates the island’s freshest offerings. Culebra Culinary Oasis brings you an elevated fusion of local seafood, premium meats, and traditional Puerto Rican flavors. An experience that seamlessly blends the rich culinary heritage of Puerto Rico with the vibrant, fresh flavors of Culebra. Every detail is crafted to ensure a memorable and indulgent dining experience, whether it’s a romantic evening, a family gathering, or a special celebration.
Indulge in freshly caught fish like red grouper, strawberry grouper, and a variety of snappers, all paired with succulent churrasco, tender costillas, and traditional sides like tostones, arroz con gandules, and habichuelas. Complete your culinary journey with carefully selected wines, cheeses, and charcuterie, creating a perfect blend of island charm and gourmet luxury.
Let Culebra Culinary Oasis transform your stay into a celebration of taste and culture, all delivered directly to your doorstep in Culebra.

column93: Grocery Delivery | Shop Culebra / Botanical Board Experiences
column95:
Description for Botanical Board Experiences:

Immerse yourself in the natural elegance of Culebra with our Botanical Board Experiences—artisanal charcuterie boards thoughtfully styled with fresh, botanical garden elements sourced directly from our island. Each board is beautifully curated with premium cheeses, cured delicacies, seasonal fruits, local nuts, small-batch jams, and Culebra’s own local honey, creating a sensory experience that feels both indulgent and deeply rooted in place.

Designed for travellers seeking something unforgettable, our boards are delivered straight to your Airbnb—either placed inside the unit before your arrival or delivered at any point during your stay. Perfect for romantic evenings, birthdays, anniversaries, girls’ trips, or simply elevating a quiet island night in.

Crafted exclusively in Culebra, Puerto Rico, every board reflects the island’s beauty, flavours, and artisan charm. A true taste of Culebra, presented with botanical artistry.
